mapper.sql: a.answer_id, a.help_id, a.parent_answer_id, a.user_id, a.content, a.is_accepted, a.status, a.floor_no, a.like_count, a.created_time, a.updated_time, author.username AS author_username, COALESCE(NULLIF(author.display_name, ''), author.username) AS author_name, author.avatar_url AS author_avatar_url, parent.user_id AS parent_user_id, parent_author.username AS parent_author_username, COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_author.display_name, ''), parent_author.username) AS parent_author_name, CASE WHEN #{viewerId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM help_answer_likes liked WHERE liked.answer_id = a.answer_id AND liked.user_id = #{viewerId} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked_by_viewer
mapper.select: SELECT answer_id, help_id, parent_answer_id, user_id, content, is_accepted, status, floor_no, like_count, created_time, updated_time FROM help_answers WHERE answer_id = #{answerId}

SELECT
FROM help_answers a JOIN users author ON author.user_id = a.user_id LEFT JOIN help_answers parent ON parent.answer_id = a.parent_answer_id LEFT JOIN users parent_author ON parent_author.user_id = parent.user_id WHERE a.answer_id = #{answerId}

SELECT
FROM help_answers a JOIN users author ON author.user_id = a.user_id LEFT JOIN help_answers parent ON parent.answer_id = a.parent_answer_id LEFT JOIN users parent_author ON parent_author.user_id = parent.user_id WHERE a.help_id = #{helpId} AND a.status IN ('VISIBLE', 'DELETED') ORDER BY a.is_accepted DESC, a.floor_no ASC, a.created_time ASC, a.answer_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO help_answers ( help_id, parent_answer_id, user_id, content, is_accepted, status, floor_no, like_count ) VALUES ( #{helpId}, #{parentAnswerId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{accepted}, #{status}, #{floorNo}, COALESCE(#{likeCount}, 0) )
mapper.update: UPDATE help_answers SET status = 'DELETED', is_accepted = 0 WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} AND status = 'VISIBLE'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO help_answer_likes (answer_id, user_id) VALUES (#{answerId}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE help_answers SET is_accepted = 0 WHERE help_id = #{helpId} AND status = 'VISIBLE'
UPDATE help_answers SET is_accepted = 1 WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} AND status = 'VISIBLE'
